tool_args.label: Balanced Budget Through 2024
tool_args.raw_text: In total, the cumulative impact of the changes since the February Plan is a balanced budget through 2024. The balanced budgets through 2024 are based on federal COVID relief funds that have already been awarded to MTA and are expected to be sufficient to cover projected underlying deficits through 2024.

payload.claim_text: The cumulative impact of the changes since the February Plan is a balanced budget through 2024, based on federal COVID relief funds that have already been awarded to MTA.
payload.description: MTA July Financial Plan achieves balanced budgets through 2024 using federal COVID relief funds

evidence_refs.source_quote: In total, the cumulative impact of the changes since the February Plan is a balanced budget through 2024. The balanced budgets through 2024 are based on federal COVID relief funds that have already been awarded to MTA and are expected to be sufficient to cover projected underlying deficits through 2024.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

tool_args.label: Structural Imbalance in MTA's Finances
tool_args.raw_text: The federal funding covers the structural imbalance in MTA's finances, which is evident from the approximate $2.5 billion deficits in 2025 and 2026, after all but $327 million of federal aid is projected to be exhausted by the end of 2024.

payload.claim_text: Federal funding covers the structural imbalance in MTA's finances, evident from approximate $2.5 billion deficits in 2025 and 2026 after federal aid is exhausted by end of 2024.
payload.description: MTA's financial plan reveals structural imbalance masked by temporary federal COVID relief funding

evidence_refs.source_quote: the federal funding covers the structural imbalance in MTA's finances, which is evident from the approximate $2.5 billion deficits in 2025 and 2026, after all but $327 million of federal aid is projected to be exhausted by the end of 2024

tool_args.label: McKinsey Ridership Recovery Low Case Forecast 2026
tool_args.raw_text: The chart displays ridership recovery percentages over time... July Financial Plan (Low Case) ... 2026 - 73%

payload.description: McKinsey low case ridership recovery forecast for 2026 as percentage of pre-pandemic level

evidence_refs.source_quote: The chart displays ridership recovery percentages over time. The y-axis ranges from 30% to 90% in 10% increments. The x-axis shows years from Jan 2021 to 2026. A solid blue line represents 'Actual Results' through early 2022, reaching 61%. A dashed blue line represents the 'February Plan assumption based on prior McKinsey midpoint', which peaks at 87% in 2026. A green shaded area represents the 'July Financial Plan assumption based on updated McKinsey midpoint', with a midpoint of 80% and a range from 73% to 88% by 2026. The chart includes a note: 'Includes transit and commuter railroads'. Ridership Recovery Forecasts (%) Year Actual Results February Plan (prior) July Financial Plan (Midpoint) July Financial Plan (Low Case) July Financial Plan (High Case) Jan 2021 30% 30% 30% 30% 30% 2022 61% 77% 61% 61% 61% 2023 - 86% 69% 65% 73% 2024 - 86% 74% 68% 78% 2025 - 87% 77% 70% 80% 2026 - 87% 80% 73% 88%

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer
